TIME TEST
re:INVENT
WEEK
A VEGAS SURVIVAL RPG · 3D CUT
Third-person, GTA-style, across a scaled-down but geographically real Las Vegas Strip — every hotel sits at its true latitude/longitude, from the Welcome sign in the south up to Encore in the north. Sourced from a decade of attendee blogs:
  • Walk the real Strip: Mandalay Bay → Luxor → MGM → Bellagio → Caesars → Venetian (HQ) → Wynn.
  • Approach a conference hotel and press E to enter, then walk through the casino to the session corridors.
  • Each corridor door opens a lecture theatre with a stage and a real re:Invent recording from the playlist.
  • 20,000+ steps a day is normal. The desert dehydrates; the casino floor drains vibes.
  • Keynotes: DeSantis Mon night · Garman Tue · Werner Thu. The Expo hoodie is legendary.
  • Thursday night: re:Play. Friday noon: your flight. Survive.
WASD / arrows or drag the joystick to walk · mouse drag turns your character · camera trails behind you · E enter
DAY COMPLETE
OFFICIAL CERTIFICATE
